rows: bot intel-scan, bot full-run, bot rich-report
Alpaca bracket orders + DecisionStore + email digest
bot wheel-scan, bot wheel-manage, bot wheel-universe-build, bot iv-capture
Daily 10:15 ET; manage every 30 min 10:00–15:00 ET; build 21:30 ET; IV 09:45 ET
Library callable propose_news_trade(); not in scheduler

items.name: Stocks momentum / multi-lane equity
items.summary: The flagship US-equity workflow. Pre-market builds the universe and ranks 1500+ tickers; through the day, scanners run multi-lane signal generation, intel gates, and risk checks before submitting bracket orders to Alpaca paper.
items.trigger_cli: bot intel-scan • bot full-run • bot rich-report
items.where_llm: Not in entry path — entries are deterministic indicators. LLM enters only at the lab/evolution layer (StrategyArchitect, CodeReviewer, Calibrator) on Saturdays via roles/strategy_architect.py.
sequence: 06:30 ET — massive_refresh refreshes Polygon grouped bars and the active universe.
07:30 ET — premarket_rank re-scores candidates and writes strategy/opportunities.md.
Every N min, 09:00–15:00 ET — stock_scanner job calls bot intel-scan.
_load_active_universe pulls top-25 stocks from the ranked watchlist.
Stage-1 screener (screener.build_stage1_shortlist) computes 1d / 5d / volume score relative to SPY.
Stage-2 lanes (Momentum / MeanReversion / Breakout) emit RankedCandidate with conviction.
Live regime detection via FRED VIX (regime.detect_regime).
TradeOrchestrator.scan iterates per symbol:
W2b restricted-list (compliance.check_restricted) → skip if restricted
Idempotency check (existing position / pending order / already-traded-today)
Bar fetch + MIN_BARS_FOR_INDICATORS
W2a data-quality (check_bar_freshness, check_completeness)
MomentumStrategy.evaluate emits Signal with stop_loss + take_profit
News-sentiment floor (news_sentiment.passes_filter)
_news_intel_gate runs stock_earnings_gate, stock_insider_cluster_gate, macro_shock_gate
RiskManager.check enforces per-trade-risk %, max-position %, concentration, asset-class regime cap, gross/net cap, daily/weekly halt, per-strategy halt
AlpacaClient.place_order_with_stop_loss submits a bracket order.
TradeJournal.append + RiskAfter populated.
DecisionStore.append persists the audit, compliance, data-quality, alerts, execution-constraints JSON columns.
16:05 + 21:55 ET — Reconciler reconciles fills against Alpaca account.
16:30 ET — daily_digest email summarises trades, P&L, and rejections.

items.name: Crypto 24/7
items.summary: A continuous crypto loop that mirrors the equity orchestrator path but with crypto-specific universe discovery, data-quality thresholds, and crypto-only intel gates.
scheduler_jobs: crypto_scanner (IntervalTrigger every 30 min — no day-of-week filter)
items.where_llm: Not in entry path. Same lab/evolution layer as equities. There is also a crypto_scanner role file (roles/crypto_scanner.py).
outputs: Silent unless action taken (no email per scan)
sequence: Every 30 min — crypto_scanner job calls bot crypto-scan (24/7).
_load_active_universe(crypto_only=True) pulls auto-discovered crypto symbols from discover_crypto_universe.
Universe filtered to USD-quoted, non-stablecoin, not in strategy/crypto_blocklist.yaml.
TradeOrchestrator.scan with crypto-specific data-quality thresholds (max_bar_age_hours_crypto).
Bypasses news-sentiment floor (Polygon news is equity-focused).
Crypto-specific intel gates run:
crypto_fear_greed_gate — blocks outside [floor=20, ceiling=80]
crypto_reddit_spike_gate — blocks if mentions ≥ 2× 24h-prior
crypto_coingecko_gate — blocks if sentiment_votes_up_percentage < 50
macro_shock_gate — applies cross-asset
RiskManager.check with crypto asset-class caps.
AlpacaClient submits crypto market order.
DecisionStore.append; alerts only on action.

items.name: Options-Wheel (CSP → assigned → CC)
items.summary: A premium-selling wheel that sells cash-secured puts on quality names, holds the stock when assigned, then sells covered calls at strike ≥ cost basis. State-machine driven, no LLM.
items.trigger_cli: bot wheel-scan • bot wheel-manage • bot wheel-close • bot iv-capture • bot wheel-universe-build • bot wheel-status
scheduler_jobs: wheel_scan (10:15 ET weekdays — single daily entry)
data_sources: Alpaca option chains + IV (chain.py via OptionAlpacaClient)
Finnhub earnings calendar + market cap + listing age
strategies: WheelLane: Phase.NONE → CSP_OPEN → ASSIGNED → CC_OPEN → CLOSED
items.where_llm: None — fully deterministic. LLM only via shared lab/evolution layer.
outputs: AlertEvents (wheel_csp_opened, wheel_cc_opened, wheel_take_profit, wheel_dte_close, wheel_roll, wheel_allocation_cap)
sequence: 21:30 ET nightly — wheel_universe_builder walks Alpaca optionable equities, applies allowlist + Finnhub mcap/listing-age filters, writes wheel_universe_cache.
09:45 ET weekdays — iv_capture mass-fetches option chains, writes option_iv_history rows.
10:15 ET weekdays — wheel_scan runs once for the day.
Per symbol gather: regime, VIX, sentiment_score, IV rank, ApeWisdom WSB spike, Finnhub earnings, current WheelCycle row.

WheelLane.passes_preflight: wheel enabled; cycle phase ∈ {None, assigned}; regime ∈ {trending_up, sideways}; VIX in [floor, ceiling]; sentiment ≥ floor; IV rank ≥ 30; no WSB spike; no earnings within dte_max+2 days.
Stage-3 contract pick: pick_csp_contract or pick_cc_contract by delta band (typ. 0.20–0.30) and DTE band.
Risk gates: option_collateral_ok (allocation cap + per-symbol concentration); _sector_cap_check (default 25%).
OptionAlpacaClient.sell_to_open at limit-bid; cycle state recorded via wheel_state.open_csp / open_cc.
Every 30 min 10:00–15:00 ET — wheel_manage iterates active cycles:
Take-profit at mid ≤ (1 − take_profit_pct) × credit
Force-close at dte ≤ dte_force_close
Roll if |delta| ≥ delta_breach AND rolls_used < max_rolls_per_cycle

items.name: News-driven LLM trader
items.summary: A discretionary news-event trader powered by Claude Opus 4.7. Detects events with regex, packages context for the LLM, and parses a strict JSON action — currently library-only, not yet wired into the scheduler or CLI.
data_sources: Same intel feed as W1 (Alpaca News, Polygon news, SEC EDGAR Form 4 RSS, GDELT)
Event clusters classified by lexicon (merger, earnings, guidance, litigation, leadership_change, dividend, product_launch)
strategies: Allowed action set: NO_TRADE, ENTER, SCALE_IN, REDUCE, EXIT, HEDGE, ESCALATE
items.where_llm: Yes — pinned to claude-opus-4-7 at news_trader/news_controller.py:38.
outputs: Decision dataclass (action, sizing, stop, time_stop, reason) → DecisionStore (when wired)
sequence: Caller assembles a NewsControllerInput (symbol, market state, position, recent news cluster, primary-filing flag, novelty score).
event_extractor.extract_event runs pure-regex classification — no LLM call yet.
news_controller.propose_news_trade builds the system prompt (NEWS_CONTROLLER_PROMPT_VERSION = 'v1').
AnthropicClient.complete is called with model='claude-opus-4-7'.
Strict JSON output is parsed; on parse error → fail-closed Decision(action='no_trade').
_ACTION_MAP translates LLM action to orchestrator action string (enter, scale_in, reduce, exit, hedge, no_trade, escalate_to_human).
Returned Decision flows through RiskManager.check (when wired) before any order is placed.
